subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the nations! The Lord of Eternity hath come with His Most Great Name and summoneth you unto Him, if ye be of them that hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا معشر الامم قد اتی مالک القدم باسمه الاعظم و یدعوکم الیه ان انتم من السامعین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @proclamation to the people of the world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
